Devoted.

Software engineer by day, girl dad by calling, Chelsea supporter by loyalty, and a man anchored in faith.

👨‍💻 10 yrs experience

// about me

Building things that matter in code and in life.

I'm a software engineer with a decade of experience crafting reliable, meaningful products. But the work I'm most proud of? Raising my daughters.

This little corner of the internet is where my worlds meet a place to share what I build, believe, and love.

"Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters."

— Colossians 3:23

// what drives me

More than just a job title.

Faith

My foundation and compass. Every decision, every morning, every contribution is something bigger than myself.

Girl Dad

The greatest title I carry. Raising daughters to be brave, kind, and confident is the most meaningful project I'll ever ship.

Chelsea FC

Blue is the colour. Through the highs and the rebuilds, the loyalty never wavers.

Software Engineering

A decade of turning ideas into production. I love the architecture, the system design, the crafting, the debugging, the shipping. All of it.

// what i work with

The tech toolkit.

10 years in the industry

A decade means opinions. I know what I like, what scales, and what not to use on a Friday afternoon.

Ruby Javascript PostgreSQL System Design System Thinking Software Architecture Docker AWS CI/CD REST APIs

Dad · Dev · Devoted
